messages.select_category: Select a category above to view and edit its configuration.
messages.no_servers: You don't have any servers where you can manage the bot.
messages.need_permission: You need the "Manage Server" permission or be the server owner.

dashboard.select_server: Select a server to configure the bot.

config.markdown_info: Message fields support Discord formatting (bold, italic, etc.).
config.placeholders_intro: Placeholders are automatically replaced with actual data. Write them in braces: {placeholder}
config.ansi_colors_hint: Use in field values. Text will be displayed in a colored code block.

login.title: Log in
login.error_invalid_state: Invalid session state. Please try again.
login.error_api: Error communicating with Discord. Please try again later.

bot.description: General bot settings and admin permissions

admin_roles.name: Admin roles
admin_roles.description: Roles that can configure the bot from the web panel. The user who invited the bot and the server owner always have access.

autoname.description: Automatic nickname formatting based on server roles

required_roles.name: Required roles
required_roles.description: Only nicknames of members with one of these roles will be modified. Leave empty to process all members.

role_tags.name: Role tags
role_tags.description: Ordered list of roles and their tags. First matching role wins.

role_prefixes.name: Role prefixes
role_prefixes.description: Ordered list of roles and their prefixes. First matching role wins. Suggestions: ★ ☆ ◆ ◇ ● ○ ■ □ ▲ △ ♦ ♢ ✦ ✧ ⬥ ⬦ ◈ ❖ ✪ ⚜

tag_format.name: Tag format
tag_format.description: Tag format. Use {tag} as placeholder. Example: [ABC | {tag}]

sync_interval.name: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval.description: Periodic nickname sync frequency (0 to disable)

log_channel.name: Log channel
log_channel.description: Channel where nickname change logs will be sent

log_message_success.name: Success change message
log_message_success.description: Message when a nickname is changed. Placeholders: {old_name}, {new_name}. Leave empty to not send.

log_message_no_perms.name: No permission message
log_message_no_perms.description: Message when a nickname cannot be changed due to permissions. Placeholder: {name}. Leave empty to not send.
log_message_no_perms.default: Could not change nickname of **{name}** (no permission)

verification_enabled.name: Verification enabled
verification_enabled.description: Enable or disable the verification system

blocking_roles.name: Roles that block verification
blocking_roles.description: Users with any of these roles will not be able to start verification. Use to prevent already verified users from verifying again.

auto_reject_review_window.name: Review window (minutes)
auto_reject_review_window.description: Minutes during which a moderator can review an auto-rejection. 0 to disable.

screenshot_timeout_minutes.name: Screenshot timeout (minutes)
screenshot_timeout_minutes.description: Minutes the user has to send screenshots before the request is automatically rejected. 0 to disable.

verification_channel.name: Verification channel
verification_channel.description: Channel where the verification panel with buttons is published. Only channels where the bot has write permission are shown.

verification_panel_message.name: Panel message
verification_panel_message.description: Message that appears in the verification panel. If you include an image URL (ending in .png, .jpg, .gif, etc.) it will be displayed as an image in the embed.
verification_panel_message.default:
**Welcome to {server_name}!**

To access the server, you need to verify. Click the corresponding button to get started.

verify_button_text.name: Verify button text
verify_button_text.description: Text of the normal verification button

verify_ally_button_text.name: Ally button text
verify_ally_button_text.description: Text of the ally verification button

health_check_interval.name: Health check interval (minutes)
health_check_interval.description: Frequency of panel verification (0 to disable)

verification_type_regular_display.name: Normal type name
verification_type_regular_display.description: Name to display for normal verification in messages

dm_instructions_message.name: DM instructions
dm_instructions_message.description: Message sent to user via DM with instructions
dm_instructions_message.default:
**Verification Instructions**

Hello {username}! To complete your verification in **{server_name}**, send **2 screenshots** in a single message.

regular_roles_add.name: Roles to add
regular_roles_add.description: Roles that are added when approving normal verification

regular_roles_remove.name: Roles to remove
regular_roles_remove.description: Roles that are removed when approving normal verification

approval_message_regular.name: Approval message
approval_message_regular.description: Message sent to user when approved
approval_message_regular.default:
**Verification approved!**

Your verification in **{server_name}** has been approved. You now have full access to the server.

verification_type_ally_display.name: Ally type name
verification_type_ally_display.description: Name to display for ally verification in messages

dm_instructions_ally_message.name: DM instructions
dm_instructions_ally_message.description: Message sent to user via DM with instructions
dm_instructions_ally_message.default:
**Verification Instructions (Ally)**

Hello {username}! To complete your verification as an ally in **{server_name}**, send **2 screenshots** in a single message.

ally_roles_add.name: Roles to add
ally_roles_add.description: Roles that are added when approving ally verification

ally_roles_remove.name: Roles to remove
ally_roles_remove.description: Roles that are removed when approving ally verification

approval_message_ally.name: Approval message
approval_message_ally.description: Message sent to user when approved as ally
approval_message_ally.default:
**Ally verification approved!**

Your verification as an ally in **{server_name}** has been approved. You now have access as an ally to the server.

mod_notification_channel.name: Moderation channel
mod_notification_channel.description: Channel where moderators receive verification notifications. Only channels where the bot has write permission are shown.

tracker_title.name: Tracker title
tracker_title.description: Title of the message with the list of pending verifications. Leave empty to disable the tracker.

mod_ping_message.name: Moderator ping message
mod_ping_message.description: Message sent to notify moderators when there is a pending verification. Use {roles} to mention roles. Leave empty to not send ping.

delete_processed_messages.name: Delete processed messages
delete_processed_messages.description: Delete messages from moderation channel after approving/rejecting

accept_button_text.name: Accept button text
accept_button_text.description: Text of the accept button for moderators. Use {verification_type} to show the verification type.

reject_button_text.name: Reject button text
reject_button_text.description: Text of the reject button for moderators

review_button_text.name: Review button text
review_button_text.description: Text of the button to review auto-rejections

history_label.name: History label
history_label.description: Text for the history section in the review message

status_awaiting_screenshots.name: Status: Awaiting screenshots
status_awaiting_screenshots.description: Status text when waiting for user to send screenshots

status_pending_review.name: Status: Pending review
status_pending_review.description: Status text when screenshots are ready for review

status_ready_for_approval.name: Status: Ready for approval
status_ready_for_approval.description: Status text when automatic checks pass but requires manual approval. Use {roles} to mention the roles that can approve.

status_approved.name: Status: Approved
status_approved.description: Status text when verification was approved

status_rejected.name: Status: Rejected
status_rejected.description: Status text when verification was rejected

status_cancelled.name: Status: Cancelled
status_cancelled.description: Status text when verification was cancelled

reject_screenshot_timeout.name: Rejection: Screenshot timeout
reject_screenshot_timeout.description: Reason when user does not send screenshots in time

reject_wrong_captures.name: Rejection: Wrong screenshots
reject_wrong_captures.description: Reason when screenshots are incorrect or unreadable (API error 422)

reject_name_mismatch.name: Rejection: Name mismatch
reject_name_mismatch.description: Reason when game name does not match Discord

reject_has_regiment.name: Rejection: Has regiment
reject_has_regiment.description: Reason when user already belongs to a regiment
reject_has_regiment.default: User already belongs to a regiment

reject_time_diff.name: Rejection: Old screenshot
reject_time_diff.description: Reason when screenshot is too old

reject_wrong_shard.name: Rejection: Wrong shard
reject_wrong_shard.description: Reason when shard is incorrect. Use {shard} for the expected one

rejection_select_placeholder.name: Rejection selector placeholder
rejection_select_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the rejection reason selector

rejection_select_message.name: Rejection selector message
rejection_select_message.description: Message shown to moderator before the rejection reason selector

rejection_other_label.name: 'Other reason' label
rejection_other_label.description: Text of the option to write a custom reason

rejection_other_description.name: 'Other reason' description
rejection_other_description.description: Description of the option to write a custom reason

rejection_modal_title.name: Rejection modal title
rejection_modal_title.description: Title of the modal to write a custom reason

rejection_modal_label.name: Rejection modal field label
rejection_modal_label.description: Label of the text field in the rejection modal

rejection_modal_placeholder.name: Rejection modal placeholder
rejection_modal_placeholder.description: Help text in the rejection modal text field
rejection_modal_placeholder.default: Explain why the verification is rejected...

verification_started_message.name: Verification started
verification_started_message.description: Message shown to user when starting verification
verification_started_message.default: Check your direct messages to continue with verification.

screenshots_received_message.name: Screenshots received
screenshots_received_message.description: Confirmation message when user sends screenshots
screenshots_received_message.default: Your screenshots have been received successfully. A moderator will review your request soon.

rejection_message.name: Rejection message
rejection_message.description: Message sent to user when rejected
rejection_message.default:
**Verification rejected**

Your verification in **{server_name}** has been rejected.
**Reason:** {reason}

You can try again if you wish.

wrong_images_message.name: Error: wrong images
wrong_images_message.description: Message when exactly 2 images are not sent
wrong_images_message.default: You must send exactly **2 screenshots** in the same message. Please try again.

dm_disabled_message.name: Error: DMs disabled
dm_disabled_message.description: Message when DM cannot be sent to user
dm_disabled_message.default: I couldn't send you a direct message. Please enable DMs from server members and try again.

already_pending_message.name: Error: verification pending
already_pending_message.description: Message when user already has a pending verification
already_pending_message.default: You already have a pending verification request. Please wait.

already_verified_message.name: Error: already verified
already_verified_message.description: Message when user already has verification roles
already_verified_message.default: You already have verification roles. You don't need to verify again.

verification_disabled_message.name: Error: verification disabled
verification_disabled_message.description: Message shown when verification is not configured
verification_disabled_message.default:
⚠️ **Verification not available**

Verification is temporarily disabled. Please contact an administrator.

request_not_found_message.name: Error: request not found
request_not_found_message.description: Message when verification request is not found
request_not_found_message.default: Error: Your verification request was not found.

no_pending_verification_message.name: Error: no active verification
no_pending_verification_message.description: Message when user sends DM without having verification in progress
no_pending_verification_message.default: You don't have any verification in progress. If you want to verify, use the verification panel in the server.

pending_in_other_server_message.name: Error: verification in other server
pending_in_other_server_message.description: Message when user has pending verification in another server
pending_in_other_server_message.default: You already have verification in progress on another server. You must complete it or wait for it to be processed before starting another.

mod_approved_confirmation.name: Approval confirmation
mod_approved_confirmation.description: Message shown to moderator when approving

mod_rejected_confirmation.name: Rejection confirmation
mod_rejected_confirmation.description: Message shown to moderator when rejecting

request_already_processed_message.name: Error: request already processed
request_already_processed_message.description: Message when attempting to process an already processed request
request_already_processed_message.default: This request has already been processed.

no_permission_approve_message.name: Error: no permission to approve
no_permission_approve_message.description: Message when moderator does not have permission to approve
no_permission_approve_message.default: You do not have permission to approve verifications.

no_permission_reject_message.name: Error: no permission to reject
no_permission_reject_message.description: Message when moderator does not have permission to reject
no_permission_reject_message.default: You do not have permission to reject verifications.

verification_faction.name: Required faction
verification_faction.description: Faction that users must have to pass verification

verification_shard.name: Required shard
verification_shard.description: Shard that users must have to pass verification

verification_time_diff.name: Maximum time difference (days)
verification_time_diff.description: Maximum difference between game time and current time (0 to disable)

verification_automatic.name: Automatic processing
verification_automatic.description: Approve/reject automatically based on configured rules

verification_match_name.name: Verify name
verification_match_name.description: Comparison mode between Discord name and game name

verification_valid_regiment.name: Valid regiment
verification_valid_regiment.description: ID of the regiment allowed for normal verification. Use the full content in brackets (e.g., for '[7-HP#8707] 7th Hispanic Platoon' use '7-HP#8707'). If empty, any user with a regiment is rejected.

player_info_sections.name: Player information sections
player_info_sections.description: Sections to display player information in the moderation message. Use the 'Fields (3 col)' type to display data in columns.

stockpile.description: Manage stockpile information with location and access codes

add_command_name.name: Add command name
add_command_name.description: Name for the command to add stockpiles (without slash)

show_command_name.name: Show command name
show_command_name.description: Name for the command to show stockpiles (without slash)

delete_command_name.name: Delete command name
delete_command_name.description: Name for the command to delete stockpiles (without slash)

command_channel.name: Command channel
command_channel.description: Channel where stockpile commands must be used. Leave empty to disable commands.

notification_channel.name: Notification channel
notification_channel.description: Channel where stockpile add/delete notifications are sent. Leave empty to disable.

add_roles.name: Roles that can add stockpiles
add_roles.description: Only users with these roles can add new stockpiles

delete_roles.name: Roles that can delete stockpiles
delete_roles.description: Only users with these roles can delete stockpiles

allowed_view_roles.name: Allowed view roles
allowed_view_roles.description: Roles that can be assigned to stockpiles for viewing. When adding a stockpile, only these roles can be selected.

add_success_text.name: Add success message
add_success_text.description: Message shown when a stockpile is added successfully

show_item_text.name: Show item message
show_item_text.description: Text for each stockpile in the list

show_empty_text.name: Show empty message
show_empty_text.description: Message when no stockpiles are found

delete_success_text.name: Delete success message
delete_success_text.description: Message shown when a stockpile is deleted

no_permission_text.name: No permission message
no_permission_text.default: You don't have permission to perform this action.

not_found_text.name: Not found message
not_found_text.description: Message when stockpile is not found

invalid_code_text.name: Invalid code message
invalid_code_text.description: Message when code format is invalid

invalid_roles_text.name: Invalid roles message
invalid_roles_text.description: Message when selected roles are not allowed
invalid_roles_text.default: One or more selected roles are not in the allowed view roles list.

wrong_channel_text.name: Wrong channel message
wrong_channel_text.description: Message when command is used in wrong channel
wrong_channel_text.default: This command can only be used in {channel}.

add_notification_text.name: Add notification message
add_notification_text.description: Public message sent to notification channel when a stockpile is added. Leave empty to disable.

delete_notification_text.name: Delete notification message
delete_notification_text.description: Public message sent to notification channel when a stockpile is deleted. Leave empty to disable.

purge.description: Purge system for member activity management

mod_channel.name: Moderation channel
mod_channel.description: Channel where moderators activate and manage purges

mod_message_template.name: Authorization message template
mod_message_template.description: Message displayed when a purge is initiated. Dynamically updated with status and authorizer list.

mod_button_color.name: Authorization button color
mod_button_color.description: Color of the button moderators use to authorize

mod_button_text.name: Authorization button text
mod_button_text.description: Text that appears on the button (can include emojis)

mod_required_reactions.name: Required reactions
mod_required_reactions.description: Number of moderators that must authorize to activate the purge

mod_reaction_timeout.name: Time limit (minutes)
mod_reaction_timeout.description: Minutes to get the required authorizations. 0 = no limit.

mod_message_retention.name: Message retention (minutes)
mod_message_retention.description: Minutes the message remains after completion. 0 = permanent.

mod_status_pending.name: Status: Pending
mod_status_pending.description: Text when waiting for more authorizations

mod_status_authorized.name: Status: Authorized
mod_status_authorized.description: Text when required authorizations are obtained

mod_status_expired.name: Status: Expired
mod_status_expired.description: Text when authorizations are not obtained in time

mod_status_cancel_pending.name: Status: Cancel pending
mod_status_cancel_pending.description: Text when cancellation is initiated but votes are missing

mod_status_cancelled.name: Status: Cancelled
mod_status_cancelled.description: Text when the purge is cancelled

mod_status_executed.name: Status: Executed
mod_status_executed.description: Text when the purge is executed successfully

mod_stop_button_text.name: Stop button text
mod_stop_button_text.description: Text of the button to stop an active purge

mod_active_purge_text.name: Message: Active purge
mod_active_purge_text.description: Message when trying to start another purge while one is active
mod_active_purge_text.default: There is already an active purge. Wait for it to finish or cancel it.

mod_no_permission_text.name: Message: No permissions
mod_no_permission_text.description: Message when the user doesn't have the role to use the command
mod_no_permission_text.default: You don't have permission to execute this command.

user_channel.name: User channel
user_channel.description: Channel where users see the purge message and react

user_button_color.name: Confirmation button color
user_button_color.description: Color of the button users use to confirm

user_button_text.name: Confirmation button text
user_button_text.description: Text of the button users press (can include emojis)

user_reaction_role.name: Role on reaction
user_reaction_role.description: Role assigned to users when they react to the button

user_first_reaction_text.name: Message: First reaction
user_first_reaction_text.description: Message (ephemeral) when the user confirms for the first time
user_first_reaction_text.default: You have confirmed your stay. Thank you!

user_removed_reaction_text.name: Message: Confirmation withdrawn
user_removed_reaction_text.description: Message (ephemeral) when the user withdraws their confirmation

test_mode.name: Test mode
test_mode.description: Allows skipping minimum restrictions: only requires 1 authorization and executes in 2 minutes.

audit_level.name: Audit level
audit_level.description: 0 = No messages, 1 = Titles only, 2 = All actions

log_channel.name: Log channel
log_channel.description: Channel where purge logs will be sent. Leave empty to disable.

exec_msg_simulation.name: Message: Test mode
exec_msg_simulation.description: Indicator at the beginning of logs when running in test mode

exec_msg_cleaning_role.name: Message: Cleaning role
exec_msg_cleaning_role.description: Message for each affected role (level 2). Placeholder: {role}

exec_msg_user_cleaned.name: Message: User purged
exec_msg_user_cleaned.description: Message for each purged user (level 2). Placeholder: {user}

exec_msg_promotion_role.name: Message: Role promotion
exec_msg_promotion_role.description: Message for each role promotion (level 2). Placeholders: {from_role}, {to_role}

exec_msg_user_promoted.name: Message: User promoted
exec_msg_user_promoted.description: Message for each promoted user (level 2). Placeholders: {user}, {from_role}, {to_role}

exec_msg_promotion_default.name: Message: Role for non-affected
exec_msg_promotion_default.description: Message when applying role to users who confirmed without being in affected roles (level 2). Placeholder: {role}

exec_msg_user_promoted_default.name: Message: Non-affected user
exec_msg_user_promoted_default.description: Message for each non-affected user receiving the role (level 2). Placeholders: {user}, {role}

exec_msg_global_remove_start.name: Message: Global cleanup start
exec_msg_global_remove_start.description: Message when starting global role removal (level 1+)

exec_msg_global_remove_user.name: Message: Global cleanup user
exec_msg_global_remove_user.description: Message for each user having global roles removed (level 2). Placeholders: {user}, {roles}

war_command_name.name: Command name
war_command_name.description: Name of the slash command to start the war end purge

war_display_name.name: Display name
war_display_name.description: Name that appears in the moderation message (e.g.: 'War end')

war_message_template.name: User message template
war_message_template.description: Message users see when the purge is active. {date} shows date with dynamic Discord countdown.

war_admin_roles.name: Admin roles
war_admin_roles.description: Roles that can start and authorize the purge

war_affected_roles.name: Affected roles
war_affected_roles.description: Roles whose members must confirm to stay or will be purged

war_roles_to_remove.name: Roles to remove (purged)
war_roles_to_remove.description: Roles removed from purged members. Leave empty to remove all roles.

war_roles_to_add.name: Roles to assign (purged)
war_roles_to_add.description: Roles assigned to purged members after removing roles

war_global_roles_to_remove.name: Roles to remove (everyone)
war_global_roles_to_remove.description: Roles removed from ALL server members, regardless of whether they reacted or are in affected roles

war_promotions.name: Promotions
war_promotions.description: Role replacement for members who confirm. If the source role is in 'Affected roles', it is replaced. If not, the target role is added without removing the source.

war_default_promotion.name: Role for non-affected
war_default_promotion.description: Role to assign to users who confirmed but did NOT have any affected role. Useful to identify who reacted without being in the target group. Leave empty to ignore them.

war_exec_msg_finish.name: Message: Purge end

global_command_name.name: Command name
global_command_name.description: Name of the slash command to start the global purge

global_display_name.name: Display name
global_display_name.description: Name that appears in the moderation message (e.g.: 'Global purge')

global_message_template.name: User message template
global_message_template.description: Message users see when the global purge is active. {date} shows date with dynamic Discord countdown.
global_message_template.default:
**ACTIVE GLOBAL PURGE**

A global purge has been initiated that affects **all members**.

Execution date: {date}

React to the button to confirm your stay and get the {reaction_role} role.

global_admin_roles.name: Admin roles
global_admin_roles.description: Roles that can start and authorize global purges

global_excluded_roles.name: Excluded roles
global_excluded_roles.description: Roles that will NOT be affected by the global purge (e.g.: moderators, bots, special roles)

global_roles_to_remove.name: Roles to remove
global_roles_to_remove.description: Roles removed from members who don't confirm

global_roles_to_add.name: Roles to assign
global_roles_to_add.description: Roles assigned to members who don't confirm (useful to mark them as inactive)
